mapper.select: SELECT pi.id AS item_id, pi.item_name, pi.unit, pi.specification, pc.category_name, gl.location_name, pr.price, pr.currency, pr.price_unit, ps.source_name, ps.reliability_level, pr.effective_time, pr.confidence FROM price_record pr INNER JOIN price_item pi ON pr.item_id = pi.id INNER JOIN price_category pc ON pi.category_id = pc.id INNER JOIN geo_location gl ON pr.location_id = gl.id INNER JOIN price_source ps ON pr.source_id = ps.id INNER JOIN ( -- 找到每个物品+地点的最新价格记录ID SELECT item_id, location_id, MAX(effective_time) AS max_effective_time FROM price_record WHERE item_id = #{item_id} -- 这里传入你要查询的物品ID GROUP BY item_id, location_id ) latest ON pr.item_id = latest.item_id AND pr.location_id = latest.location_id AND pr.effective_time = latest.max_effective_time WHERE pi.id = #{item_id} -- 同样限制物品ID ORDER BY gl.id;

SELECT pi.id AS item_id, pi.item_name, pi.unit, pi.specification, pc.category_name, gl.location_name, DATE(pr.effective_time) AS time, -- 聚合粒度为天，可改为周/月 AVG(pr.price) AS price -- 同一时间点多条价格取平均，可改为 MAX/MIN FROM price_record pr INNER JOIN price_item pi ON pr.item_id = pi.id INNER JOIN price_category pc ON pi.category_id = pc.id INNER JOIN geo_location gl ON pr.location_id = gl.id INNER JOIN price_source ps ON pr.source_id = ps.id WHERE 1=1 -- 物品筛选 AND (pi.id = :itemId OR pi.id IN (:itemIds) OR pi.item_code = :itemCode) -- 地点筛选 AND (gl.id = :locationId OR gl.id IN (:locationIds)) -- 来源筛选 AND (pr.source_id IN (:sourceIds)) -- 最小可靠等级 AND (ps.reliability_level >= :minReliability) -- 币种 AND (:currency IS NULL OR pr.currency = :currency) -- 最小可信度 AND (:minConfidence IS NULL OR pr.confidence >= :minConfidence) -- 时间范围 AND pr.effective_time BETWEEN :startTime AND :endTime GROUP BY pi.id, gl.id, DATE(pr.effective_time) ORDER BY pi.id, gl.id, DATE(pr.effective_time);
